reasoning: The leaderboard is currently dominated by Google's Gemini 3 Pro with an Elo of around 1501, successfully overtaking xAI's Grok 4.1 (Elo ~1483) in late November/early December 2025. Bridging an 18-point Elo gap organically over just 10 days without a model update is practically impossible given the voting volume on the Chatbot Arena. Therefore, xAI would need to launch a new, superior model to win. Elon Musk teased Grok 4.20 on Dec 8 ("3 or 4 weeks" away) and again on Dec 15 ("3 weeks" away), pointing to a January 2026 launch. A specialized prediction market gives only a 23% chance of Grok 4.20 releasing before Dec 31. Even if xAI releases Grok 4.20 right before the deadline, it would have to be immediately added to the Arena and gather enough blind votes to stabilize at #1 by Dec 31 at 12:00 PM ET, while also overcoming Gemini 3 Pro entirely (since alphabetical tie-breaking favors Google). For all these reasons, the 3% Polymarket price from mid-December is accurate. I estimate a 4% chance.
